title: Clean Entry List
description: Removes the box and top and bottom shadows from the Resource Pack menu and other similar menu screens.
body:
Clean Entry List is the smallest mod I've made for one simple purpose that is to remove the ugly bezels that plague the Resource Pack menu.

Why though?
I needed this mod a long time ago when I knew little to nothing about making mods and when I asked around nobody had any idea or just didn't care enough. Now that I know a bit of modding I got reminded of this, thought I'd take a look and well it was just 2 lines of code. Hope it helps others looking for this.

This is a client side mod and will do nothing on a server.
The mod is compatible with FancyMenu which was my primary use case when I needed it.

Below are comparisons of what the mod does.
